theme_archetype.name: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
theme_archetype.description: A war-room / NOC / command-center aesthetic. Professional, serious, and authoritative tone. High-density, minimal noise, and data-forward.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense and compact. Tailwind scale: p-2, p-4, p-6. Container gaps gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges or minimal radius (rounded-sm max 4px). Use border-collapse style layouts with 1px borders for a technical skeleton look.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned, data-forward. No centered hero layouts.

components.strategy: Hybrid: Pure HTML/Tailwind for strict grids, Shadcn UI for dropdowns, selects, tabs, and tables. No generic Shadcn cards—use raw divs with 1px borders.
components.global_shell: Sticky/fixed layout with a horizontal ticker at the top. Left or top navigation.
components.live_signal_ticker: Marquee text with JetBrains Mono, small uppercase font, no background just text and dots. Highlight HIGH_RISK in critical red.
components.unified_insight_row: Compact KPI cards (col-span-1) with sharp numbers.
components.floating_ai_analyst: Glass-morphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10. Positioned fixed bottom-right.
components.charts: Recharts or Visx. Use semantic colors for bars/pies representing risk. Use thin grid lines.
components.leaflet_map: Dark mode map tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter). Map pins colored by severity.

motion_and_interactions.live_alerts: Pulsing animation (ping) on red dots for real-time WebSocket alerts.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight brightness increase. hover:bg-white/5 or hover:border-white/30. High-contrast focus rings.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Instant or very fast (100ms-150ms). No slow elegant fades—this is a rapid intelligence dashboard.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric lines and shapes on black background. Use as a faint background image for the login page.
Sophisticated black and white studio portrait of a middle-aged businessman in a formal suit against a dark background. Use for Executive Role Switcher / User Dropdown.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text against dark backgrounds passes APCA contrast ratios. Red/Orange text must be legible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a pure frontend (React/Tailwind/Shadcn) OSINT Dashboard.
Enforce Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) in Dark Mode.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Chivo for headings and JetBrains Mono for data.
DO NOT use purple or teal gradients.
Ensure the Severity colors exactly match: Critical=#FF3B30, High=#FF9500, Medium=#FFCC00, Low=#34C759.
Design for high-density, minimal noise (Control Room Grid).
Include a data-testid on all buttons, links, and major components.
Implement the Live Signal Ticker and Floating AI Analyst (with glassmorphism) exactly as described.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for bento-style/grid layouts instead of default Shadcn Cards to maintain strict 1px border skeleton styling.
Only use provided media URLs from this file. No placeholder images like via.placeholder.com.
Remember to read from /app/design_guidelines.json for comprehensive UI/UX specs before coding.
